name: Stromboli#2
recipeIngredient: 2 Frozen Loaves bread dough, thaw (1 lb each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Let the dough rise in a warm place until doubled.
2. Punch down the dough.
3. Roll the loaves together into one 15x12 inches rectangle.
4. Layer Ham and Pepperoni on half of the dough (lengthwise).
5. Sprinkle with Onion and Green pepper.
6. Top with 1/4 cup pizza sauce.
7. Layer Mozzarella, Bologna, Salami, and Swiss cheese over the sauce.
8. Sprinkle with Basil, Oregano, Garlic powder, and Pepper.
9. Spread another 1/4 cup pizza sauce on top.
10. Fold the plain half of dough over the filling and seal edges well.
11. Place on an ungreased 15x10x1 inches baking pan.
12. Bake at 375°F for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown.
13. Brush with melted butter.
14. Heat the remaining pizza sauce and serve with sliced stromboli.
